vllm.title: [CI/Build] Test both text and token IDs in batched OpenAI Completions API
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Check if the current prompt parsing logic can handle both batched text and batched token IDs. Previously, only batched text is tested.
This test was originally added in #4028, but I have split it out in hopes of getting it merged sooner.

vllm.title: [misc] Do not allow to use lora with chunked prefill.
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It is currently not supported. See #4995. I will address it when I have bandwidth

vllm.title: add gptq_marlin test for bug report https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/5088
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: A test to ensure bug report #5088 is fixed

vllm.title: [BugFix] Don't start a Ray cluster when not using Ray
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The logic to auto-select the distributed executor backend uses ray.util.get_current_placement_group() to check whether it's already running in a Ray placement group, but this function has a side effect of starting a Ray cluster if it's not already started.
The result is that a Ray cluster gets start

vllm.title: [Fix] Correct OpenAI batch response format
vllm.author: zifeitong
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The response body should be nested into another object as in https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/batch/request-output.
